title: Plain Create
description: A small Create modpack, focusing on just the Create stuff without the bells and whistles, while doing its best for maintainability and backwards combatability.
body:
# Plain Create

A small Create modpack, focusing on just the Create stuff without the bells and whistles, while doing its best for maintainability and backwards combatability.

## Inclued Mods

### Content

- [3D Placable Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/3d-placeable-food)
- [Chisel & Bits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits)
- [Colossal Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/colossal-chests)
- [Construction Wand](https://modrinth.com/mod/construction-wand)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)
- [Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors)
- [Create Railways Navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator)
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice)
- [Extended Slabs +](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-slabs-plus)
- [Immersive Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings)
- [Majrusz Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-enchantments)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)

### QOL (clientside)

- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Embeddium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium-extra)
- [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleavesforge)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
- [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)
- [Xaeron's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Xaeron's Minimap (Fair-Play)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair)

### Performance

- [Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/canary)
- [CreateBetterFps](https://modrinth.com/mod/createbetterfps)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fast Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastboot)
- [Fast Load](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
